tool_name: DCOIR Airtable WBS09 Verify Relative-Date Filters
trigger_conditions: Use after relative-date filter readback repair validation when WBS09 needs broad read-only verification of all manifest targets using filter.relative_date.on_or_before_today before any wider apply/repair automation.
input_contract: Requires DCOIR_REPO_ROOT, DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR, WBS09 manifest, capability map, and local authenticated Chrome profile. Broad mode requires -AllSupportedRelativeDateTargets and -ConfirmToken VERIFY_WBS09_RELATIVE_DATE_FILTERS. Explicit mode accepts one or more -TargetKey values.
output_contract: Writes DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR/dcoir_wbs09_verify_relative_date_filters_<timestamp> with selected target list, per-target readback reports, screenshots/dom evidence when enabled, and verify_relative_date_filters_rollup.json.
safety_preconditions: Read-only verification only. Does not create/delete views, add/remove/edit filters, edit sort rows, records, fields, tables, or automations. Browser launch is gated with operator Enter and timeout. Gaps are reported as evidence, not automatically repaired.
